name: onec-kz-mcp
description: Universal MCP server for 1C:Бухгалтерия Kazakhstan — any industry (agro, manufacturing, trade, services, construction, transport) via OData as Claude tools

scripts.build: npm run build:registry && esbuild apps/mcp/src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.bundle.js --tsconfig=tsconfig.json --packages=external --alias:@aibos/services=./packages/services/src/index.ts --alias:@aibos/onec-client=./packages/onec-client/src/index.ts --alias:@aibos/kz-accounts=./packages/kz-accounts/src/index.ts && node -e "const{cpSync,mkdirSync,existsSync}=require('fs');mkdirSync('dist/data',{recursive:true});cpSync('packages/kz-accounts/src/data/chart.json','dist/data/chart.json');cpSync('apps/mcp/src/data/tool-registry.json','dist/data/tool-registry.json');cpSync('apps/mcp/src/data/workflows.json','dist/data/workflows.json');if(existsSync('apps/mcp/src/skills')){mkdirSync('dist/skills',{recursive:true});cpSync('apps/mcp/src/skills','dist/skills',{recursive:true});console.log('Copied skills/*.md')}"
